caption: A screen recording captures a web browser with multiple open tabs, including titles like "Trust & Learning by Systemic," "Future of Society by Systemic," and "Road Community Food System." A video call window is visible in the top right corner, showing a man with a light-colored complexion wearing a dark shirt. The main content of the browser displays a black screen with green text. The phrase "Pleasant Breakfast" is positioned in the upper left quadrant, while "Unsightly Growth" appears in the lower right quadrant. Throughout the sequence, the scene remains largely static, with the man in the video call window maintaining a steady expression and the text on the black background remaining in the same position. The browser interface, including the address bar and various bookmarks, persists across the recording without change.
